title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Katakuri, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Crap! He's back to his strong version!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that as long as I'm calm,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You'll slip up again, I know it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But you will wilt long before then.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah! You mean gear fourth's time limit, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't be able to use Haki for about 10 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time for me to get as far from here as I can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A power-up with a time limit, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not soft enough to just let that slide!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 20 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
